nasb.text: “For just as the new heavens and the new earth Which I make will endure before Me,” declares the Lord, “So your offspring and your name will endure.

esv.text: “For as the new heavens and the new earth that I make shall remain before me, says the Lord, so shall your offspring and your name remain.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“我所要造的新天新地怎樣在我面前留存，你們的後裔和你們的名字也必怎樣長存。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“正如我造的新天新地在我面前长存， 你们的名字和后裔也必长存。

csbs.text: 耶和华宣告： “我所造的新天新地怎样在我面前长存， 你们的后裔和你们的名字也怎样长存。”
